creator: makc@issp.ac.ru
text:
Hi,

Is there any strong reason to build graphics/libwmf  with X11 support by 
default? As I understand it builds simple gui frontend, while most if not all 
ports which depends on graphics/libwmf need only the library.
If so, can you consider to disable X11 in graphics/libwmf, and remove libwmf-
nox11 port?

Regards,
Max
